Query.Name: Q_MONTHLY
Query.SelectStatement: SELECT DEPT_NAME, EMPLOYEE_COUNT, TOTAL_SALARY, AVG_SALARY, HIRE_COUNT_YTD FROM V_MONTHLY_DEPT_SUMMARY WHERE REPORT_MONTH = :P_MONTH ORDER BY DEPT_NAME

Query.Name: Q_TOTALS
Query.SelectStatement: SELECT SUM(TOTAL_SALARY) AS GRAND_TOTAL, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_DEPTS FROM V_MONTHLY_DEPT_SUMMARY WHERE REPORT_MONTH = :P_MONTH
